title: Upgrade React 16 to React 18 across frontend modules
description: Several frontend components still use deprecated React 16 lifecycle methods. Upgrading will improve performance and security.
impact: Reduces security vulnerabilities and improves rendering performance by ~20%

title: Replace synchronous database calls in PayrollManager batch processor
description: The payroll batch processing engine uses blocking synchronous DB calls which cause timeouts under load.
impact: Eliminates batch processing timeouts affecting 720 active payroll users

title: Implement unit test coverage for HRManagementSuite leave module
description: The leave management module has less than 20% unit test coverage, leading to frequent regression bugs.
impact: Reduces regression defect rate by an estimated 40%

title: Refactor monolithic CRM data access layer to repository pattern
description: CRM data access is tightly coupled to business logic, making it difficult to test and scale.
impact: Enables horizontal scaling and reduces time-to-feature for new CRM functionality

title: Fix SQL injection vulnerabilities in InventoryTracker search API
description: Legacy search endpoints use string concatenation for SQL queries, exposing the system to injection attacks.
impact: Closes critical OWASP Top 10 vulnerability; prevents potential data breach

title: Remove dead code and unused dependencies in ProjectManager
description: Over 30% of the ProjectManager codebase consists of unused modules and outdated library dependencies.
impact: Reduces build size by ~35% and speeds up CI pipeline

title: Consolidate duplicated invoice calculation logic in AccountingPro
description: Invoice tax calculation logic is duplicated in three separate modules with slight variations causing discrepancies.
impact: Eliminates tax calculation discrepancies reported by 15+ customers

title: Implement API rate limiting for all public HRManagementSuite endpoints
description: Public HR API endpoints lack rate limiting, making them vulnerable to abuse and DoS attacks.
impact: Protects against DDoS attacks and prevents API abuse by malicious actors
